items.name_en: 5BB117: Miu Miu New Briefcase, featuring this year's popular new velvet leather, hot all over the internet, canvas lining. items.name_en: Original Miu Miu 5BB142 New Bowling Bag, a main item on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year 🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern.
